nl_query: For each script with an active legal hold, show the hold duration in days, whether the hold overlaps with the board evaluation deadline, whether the script has already been published, and the case reference number.
failed_sql: SELECT sh.id, sh.script_id, a.urn, sh.case_id, sh.hold_reason, sh.hold_start_date, sh.hold_end_date, sh.is_active, sh.released_at, sh.block_status, sh.block_reason, sh.block_comments, a.lifecycle_status, a.scan_status, a.evaluation_status, a.block_status, a.block_reason, a.block_comments, a.total_marks, a.is_held, a.created_at, a.updated_at, b.id AS board_id, b.exam_id, b.qp_id, b.status, b.deadline, b.deadline_enforcement, b.rate_card_snapshot, au.display_name AS placed_by, au.name AS placed_by_name, au.employee_erp_id AS placed_by_employee_erp_id, ea.id AS evaluation_attempt_id, ea.status AS evaluation_attempt_status, ea.is_active AS evaluation_attempt_is_active, ea.frozen_at AS evaluation_attempt_frozen_at, ea.submitted_at AS evaluation_attempt_submitted_at, ea.evaluation_cycle AS evaluation_attempt_evaluation_cycle, sc.id AS student_cache_id, sc.student_erp_id AS student_cache_student_erp_id, sc.name AS student_cache_name, sc.student_erp_id AS student_cache_student_erp_id, esc.id AS exam_schedule_cache_id, esc.exam_erp_id AS exam_schedule_cache_exam_erp_id, esc.academic_year AS exam_schedule_cache_academic_year, qp.id AS question_paper_id, qp.title AS question_paper_title, qp.is_locked AS question_paper_is_locked, qp.erp_id AS question_paper_erp_id, au2.display_name AS approved_by_name, au2.name AS approved_by_name, au2.employee_erp_id AS approved_by_employee_erp_id FROM script_hold sh JOIN answer_script a ON a.id = sh.script_id JOIN board b ON b.course_id = a.course_id AND b.exam_id = a.exam_id JOIN academic_unit au ON au.id = b.course_id JOIN script_assignment sa ON sa.script_id = a.id JOIN evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.assignment_id = sa.id JOIN student_cache sc ON sc.id = a.student_id JOIN exam_schedule_cache esc ON esc.id = a.exam_id JOIN question_paper qp ON qp.id = a.qp_id JOIN app_user au2 ON au2.id = sh.approved_by WHERE sh.is_active = TRUE AND sh.released_at IS NULL AND sh.case_id IS NOT NULL AND a.evaluation_status IN ('NOT_ASSIGNED', 'ASSIGNED', 'IN_PROGRESS') AND a.block_status IN ('NONE', 'MALPRACTICE') GROUP BY sh.id, sh.script_id, a.urn, sh.case_id, sh.hold_reason, sh.hold_start_date, sh.hold_end_date, sh.is_active, sh.released_at, sh.block_status, sh.block_reason, sh.block_comments, a.lifecycle_status, a.scan_status, a.evaluation_status, a.block_status, a.block_reason, a.block_comments, a.total_marks, a.is_held, a.created_at, a.updated_at, b.id AS board_id, b.exam_id, b.qp_id, b.status, b.deadline, b.deadline_enforcement, b.rate_card_snapshot, au.display_name AS placed_by, au.name AS placed_by_name, au.employee_erp_id AS placed_by_employee_erp_id, ea.id AS evaluation_attempt_id, ea.status AS evaluation_attempt_status, ea.is_active AS evaluation_attempt_is_active, ea.frozen_at AS evaluation_attempt_frozen_at, ea.submitted_at AS evaluation_attempt_submitted_at, ea.evaluation_cycle AS evaluation_attempt_evaluation_cycle, sc.id AS student_cache_id, sc.student_erp_id AS student_cache_student_erp_id, sc.name AS student_cache_name, sc.student_erp_id AS student_cache_student_erp_id, esc.id AS exam_schedule_cache_id, esc.exam_erp_id AS exam_schedule_cache_exam_erp_id, esc.academic_year AS exam_schedule_cache_academic_year, qp.id AS question_paper_id, qp.title AS question_paper_title, qp.is_locked AS question_paper_is_locked, qp.erp_id AS question_paper_erp_id, au2.display_name AS approved_by_name, au2.name AS approved_by_name, au2.employee_erp_id AS approved_by_employee_erp_id ORDER BY sh.hold_start_date ASC
